Name: YouTube Video Summaries & Transcripts via Gemini API
Description: Automate extraction of YouTube video transcripts, summaries, scene descriptions, and social media clips using Google Gemini API and n8n automation. Easily customize prompts and output for versatile video content analysis and marketing.

Name: AI TikTok/YouTube Shorts Reel Generator
Description: Automates creation of POV short-form videos for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Reels using OpenAI for captions & scripts, PiAPI's Flux & Kling for AI image and video generation, Eleven Labs for voiceover, Creatomate for video rendering, plus Google Sheets/Drive for data and file management.

Name: YouTube to SEO Blog Post Automator
Description: Automate SEO blog post creation from YouTube videos using Dumpling AI for transcripts and image generation, OpenAI's GPT-4o for content writing, and Gmail for emailing the finished post. Converts video content into optimized, structured blog-ready HTML with engaging images.

Name: YouTube Trend Analyzer AI
Description: An n8n workflow using LangChain AI, OpenAI GPT, YouTube API, and custom memory management to help YouTube creators discover trending videos and content patterns in their niche from the last 2 days. It provides insightful analytics with video stats and channels links.

Name: YouTube Video Comment Analysis & Reporting
Description: Automates analysis of YouTube video details and up to 100 comments using YouTube Data API, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, and n8n. Generates detailed creator reports with sentiment, themes, engagement, and content suggestions. Saves reports to Google Drive and sends via Gmail.

Name: YouTube AI Assistant Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow that automates YouTube content insight extraction using YouTube Data API, OpenAI, Apify, and PostgreSQL. It supports channel and video details retrieval, comment analysis, video transcription, thumbnail evaluation, and integrates AI agent conversational tools to help creators optimize and plan content.

Name: YouTube Video Chapter Generator
Description: Automates generating YouTube video chapters by extracting captions via YouTube API, processing transcripts with Google Gemini AI, and updating video descriptions. Integrates n8n, YouTube OAuth2 API, Google Gemini PaLM model, and Langchain nodes for structured output.

Name: Spotify to YouTube Playlist Sync
Description: Automates one-way synchronization from a Spotify playlist to a YouTube playlist using Spotify, YouTube Data API v3, and Supabase. It matches tracks by title, artist, and duration, updates playlists, manages deletions, and stores data persistently, with optional Discord notifications.

Name: YouTube RSS Feed Notifier with Email & Telegram
Description: Automates monitoring of YouTube channels via RSS feeds, fetching video details using YouTube Data API, and delivers custom notifications via Gmail (individual or digest emails) and Telegram. Includes OpenAI for generating responsive HTML email cards. Ideal for content creators and marketers.

Name: YouTube Video Metadata Auto Generator
Description: Automates YouTube metadata creation using n8n, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, Google Docs API, and YouTube API. Generates SEO-optimized video titles, descriptions, tags, hashtags, affiliate and promo links for enhanced audience engagement and channel growth.

Name: AI YouTube Playlist & Video Summarizer
Description: An n8n workflow using Google Gemini AI, Redis for context, Qdrant vector DB, and YouTube transcript extraction to summarize and analyze YouTube playlists or videos. Converts video content into searchable knowledge bases with interactive chat capabilities.

Name: AutoClip: Auto Video Clip Creator & YouTube Uploader
Description: Automates creating motivational video clips by combining random quotes, video backgrounds, and music stored on Google Drive and Sheets. Uses n8n with Google Drive, Google Sheets, FFmpeg for video processing, and YouTube API for upload. Perfect for creators automating content production.

Name: AI Chatbot for YouTube Video Summarization
Description: An AI-powered n8n workflow that fetches YouTube video details and transcripts via YouTube Data API & youtube-transcript package, then uses OpenAI GPT models for interactive summarization and analysis of video content through chat.

Name: YouTube Video Summarizer & Telegram Q&A with GPT-4o-mini
Description: Automates extracting YouTube video transcripts, segmenting and summarizing them using GPT-4o-mini, storing transcripts on Google Docs, and enabling interactive Q&A about the video via Telegram chat. Uses n8n with YouTube Transcript API, Google Docs API, Telegram API, and OpenAI GPT-4o-mini.

Name: YouTube Video Analysis with Google Gemini AI
Description: n8n workflow that analyzes YouTube videos using Google Generative Language API (Gemini-1.5-flash) to create summaries, transcripts, timestamps, scene descriptions, and viral clip suggestions. It fetches video metadata via YouTube API and stores outputs in Google Drive and email.

Name: Automated YouTube & Google Keyword Research
Description: An n8n workflow integrating NocoDB, DataForSEO API, and Social Flood API for automated multi-source keyword generation, filtering, and monthly search volume tracking for YouTube and Google. Ideal for SEO and content marketing automation.

Name: YouTube Subscription Video Email Notifier
Description: Automate email notifications for new YouTube videos from your subscriptions. Uses YouTube Data API v3 for subscriptions, YouTube RSS for latest videos, filters out shorts, and sends thumbnail-rich emails via SMTP. Runs hourly by default.

Name: YouTube Channel Video Alerts to Telegram
Description: Automates fetching latest videos from a specific YouTube channel using YouTube API every 30 minutes, filters new videos, and sends notifications with video title and URL to Telegram via bot. Utilizes n8n, YouTube API, and Telegram API for workflow automation.

Name: YouTube Video Upload & Playlist Management
Description: Automates uploading a video to YouTube, creating a playlist, and adding the uploaded video to it using n8n workflow nodes with YouTube OAuth2 API and local file reading.

Name: YouTube Video Description Auto-Updater
Description: An n8n workflow that automates updating YouTube video descriptions by appending custom text. Uses YouTube OAuth2 API and n8n core nodes like Set, If, Manual Trigger to fetch videos, check for description changes, and update descriptions efficiently.

Name: Sync YouTube Playlist Tracks to Spotify
Description: An n8n workflow to automate syncing tracks from a YouTube playlist to a Spotify playlist, avoiding duplicates. Uses YouTube and Spotify APIs with OAuth2, batch processing, dataset comparison, and track search for seamless playlist updates.

Name: YouTube Transcript Summarizer & Telegram Notifier
Description: Automates retrieval of YouTube video transcripts, extracts and summarizes the content using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini via LangChain, then sends summarized insights via Telegram. Utilizes YouTube API, OpenAI, LangChain, and Telegram API for content analysis and notification.

Name: YouTube Video Summarizer
Description: Automates summarization of YouTube videos by extracting transcripts via Apify API and generating concise summaries using OpenAI's GPT via LangChain in n8n workflows. Ideal for content creators and researchers to quickly get key insights from long videos.

Name: Automated YouTube to X Post Generator
Description: This n8n workflow automates fetching the latest YouTube videos, uses OpenAI GPT-4O-MINI to generate engaging X (Twitter) posts under 220 characters, and posts them automatically via the X API. It also logs posts in Google Sheets and supports Slack, Discord, and Gmail notifications.

Name: YouTube Video AI Summaries to Discord
Description: Automates fetching new YouTube videos from a channel's RSS feed, retrieves English captions via YouTube API with OAuth2, summarizes transcript content using OpenAI's GPT-3.5, and posts concise bullet-point summaries with video links to a Discord channel via webhook.

Name: YouTube Video Transcript Summarizer
Description: Automates summarization of YouTube video transcripts using SearchApi.io for transcript retrieval and OpenAI GPT-4o-mini model via Langchain in n8n. Converts video_id input into concise video content summaries for easy consumption.

Name: Auto Post YouTube Videos to X
Description: Automates posting new YouTube videos to X (Twitter) every 30 min using YouTube API, OpenAI GPT-3.5 for post generation, and X API for publishing engaging tweets linking the latest video.

Name: Auto Post New YouTube Videos to X
Description: Automates posting engaging tweets about new YouTube videos using YouTube API, OpenAI's GPT-3.5 for content generation, and X (Twitter) API for posting. Runs every 30 minutes to promote latest video with AI-generated short posts.

Name: YouTube Engaging Moments Extractor
Description: An n8n workflow that extracts engaging moments from YouTube videos using the YouTube 'mostReplayed' API endpoint. It filters moments with intensity above 0.6, removes close timestamps, and returns human-readable links with timestamps. Utilizes n8n HTTP Request, Filter, Split, and Webhook nodes.

Name: YouTube Video URLs Sync to Google Sheets
Description: Automates fetching YouTube video URLs from channel IDs stored in Google Sheets using YouTube Data API, then updates another Google Sheet with video titles, URLs, and publish dates. Built with n8n, Google Sheets API, and YouTube API for streamlined content tracking.

Name: YouTube Videos AI Summary & Discord Alert
Description: Automates summarizing YouTube video captions using YouTube API and ChatGPT (OpenAI), then posts engaging summaries to Discord via webhook. Triggered by new videos from a channel's RSS feed, it fetches English captions, converts them, creates bullet-point summaries, and shares them instantly to Discord.

Name: YouTube Video Metadata Automation
Description: Automates fetching latest YouTube videos, extracting transcripts via Apify API, generating SEO-optimized descriptions and tags with OpenAI GPT-4 and Google Gemini models, and updating video metadata. Enables scheduling and batch processing of videos using YouTube OAuth2 API within n8n.

Name: YouTube Comment Sentiment Analyzer
Description: Automated workflow to extract YouTube video URLs from Google Sheets, fetch video comments via YouTube Data API v3, analyze sentiment using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini model, and log results and timestamps back to Google Sheets for tracking and analysis.

Name: YouTube Trending Content Insight Generator
Description: An AI-powered n8n workflow leveraging OpenAI and YouTube APIs to help creators find and analyze trending YouTube videos by niche. It uses Langchain agent, YouTube Data API, and OpenAI language models to provide insightful, data-driven content trends from recent videos.

Name: YouTube Video Transcript Extractor
Description: An n8n workflow that extracts and cleans YouTube video transcripts using the YouTube Transcript RapidAPI. It takes a video URL input via a form, fetches transcript data through API, processes and cleans the text for easy use. Stack: n8n, RapidAPI, HTTP Request Node.

Name: YouTube Channel Video Stats Tracker
Description: Automates fetching and storing YouTube channel videos data using YouTube API and PostgreSQL. Retrieves recent videos, filters shorts, calculates average views, and tracks best-performing videos from last 2 weeks. Built with n8n workflow automation.

Name: YouTube Transcript Summarizer & Telegram Notifier
Description: Automates extraction, summarization, and analysis of YouTube video transcripts using YouTube API, a custom YouTube transcripter, and GPT-4o mini. Sends structured summaries and video info to a Telegram channel. Built with n8n workflow automation.

Name: YouTube Video Transcript Summarizer with LangChain
Description: An n8n workflow that uses searchapi.io to fetch YouTube video transcripts and OpenAI GPT-4o-mini via LangChain to generate detailed summaries and example Q&A, helping users quickly understand and interact with video content.

Name: [n8n] YouTube Channel RSS Feed Generator
Description: Generates multiple RSS feed formats for any public YouTube channel or video using n8n workflows, without needing Google API keys. Integrates with commentpicker.com APIs and RSS-Bridge.org to fetch channel IDs, video IDs, and produce RSS in XML, JSON, ATOM, MRSS, and more.

Name: YouTube Search and Transcript MCP Server
Description: n8n workflow using Apify API for YouTube video search, transcript retrieval, and usage metrics via an MCP server trigger. Enables integration with MCP clients like Claude Desktop to automate YouTube content research with no official rate limits.

Name: YouTube Video Transcript to Airtable
Description: Automates extracting YouTube video transcripts via a RapidAPI service, summarizes content with LangChain LLM, and updates Airtable entries with main ideas and key takeaways. Keeps content ideas fresh using Airtable, RapidAPI, and n8n scheduling for workflow automation.

Name: YouTube Video Transcript Analyzer & Summarizer
Description: Automates YouTube video analysis by extracting transcripts via youtube-transcript.io API, summarizes content using AI models (OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, DeepSeek, OpenRouter), and emails a structured summary. Ideal for creators and marketers to quickly digest video content.

Name: YouTube Auto Upload & Metadata Generator
Description: Automates uploading new videos from Google Drive to YouTube, generating SEO titles, detailed video descriptions, and relevant tags using OpenAI GPT-4.1 and Google Gemini models. Also scrapes video transcripts via Apify for content context and updates YouTube metadata automatically.

Name: YouTube Video Transcriber Bot
Description: Automates transcription of YouTube videos via Supadata API and OpenAI GPT-4O for punctuation and formatting. Validates YouTube URLs, fetches raw transcripts, and refines text for easy reading in Portuguese, streamlining video content consumption and study.

Name: YouTube Video Summarizer with AI
Description: Automates summarization of YouTube videos by extracting transcripts via Apify API, then using OpenAI's language model with n8n Langchain nodes to produce concise summaries. Ideal for content creators, researchers, and professionals seeking quick insights.

Name: YouTube AI News Playlist Creator
Description: Automates daily creation of YouTube playlists from AI news channels using Google Sheets for channel management, YouTube API to fetch recent videos, and Telegram for notifications. Deletes previous playlists to keep updates fresh and organized.

Name: Auto Insert Text into YouTube Descriptions
Description: This n8n workflow uses YouTube API to fetch videos, insert custom text between specified lines in video descriptions, and update them automatically. Ideal for YouTubers managing multiple videos. Tech stack: n8n, YouTube API, JavaScript for description editing.

Name: YouTube Playlist to Raindrop Bookmarks
Description: Automates saving new videos from a specified YouTube playlist to Raindrop.io as bookmarks every 30 mins. Uses YouTube API with OAuth2, filters new videos via workflow static data, and creates bookmarks with tags and titles in Raindrop via its OAuth2 API.

Name: Youtube Podcast Discord AI Bot
Description: An n8n workflow that creates a Discord AI assistant using Google Gemini chat and Langchain memory. It responds to user questions with context-aware answers about 'Presting Podcasts' YouTube videos, integrating webhook input and formatting replies for Discord.
